name: sentinel
description: Sentinel v3 — 9-category unified intelligence plugin. Code review, AI dev toolkit, output styles, browser testing, workflow memory, frontend design, documentation, infrastructure, and DX tools in one system.

output_style.title: Output Style
output_style.description: Active output style injected at session start. Allowed: focused, learning, verbose. Default: focused.

churn_threshold.title: Churn Threshold
churn_threshold.description: Number of edits to the same file before churn warning fires. Default: 5.

confidence_threshold.title: Confidence Threshold
confidence_threshold.description: Review agent confidence threshold (lower = more findings). Range 60-95. Default: 80.

memory_enabled.title: Memory Enabled
memory_enabled.description: Whether to inject past session learnings at SessionStart. Default: true.

a11y_wcag_level.title: WCAG Conformance Level
a11y_wcag_level.description: WCAG conformance level for accessibility audits. Allowed: A, AA, AAA. Default: AA.

rollover_trigger.title: Rollover Trigger
rollover_trigger.description: Session fork strategy. Allowed: manual (only on >rollover), graduated (warn 75% / offer 85% / auto-fork 95%), never (always compact). Default: graduated.

tdd_enforcement.title: TDD Enforcement
tdd_enforcement.description: Test-first enforcement. Allowed: off (disabled), warn (advisory), block (hard PreToolUse gate on src/ writes without test/ sibling). Default: off.

blueprint_gate.title: Blueprint Gate
blueprint_gate.description: Require ai-architect blueprint approval before ai-builder writes files. Allowed: off, warn, block. Default: warn.

team_mode.title: Team Mode
team_mode.description: Team mode: lineage is per-user and gitignored; typed learnings are shared and committed. Default: false.

risk_gating.title: Risk Gating
risk_gating.description: Auto-classify diff risk tier (GREEN/YELLOW/RED/CRITICAL) before launching review agents — saves Opus tokens on trivial changes. Default: true.

compression_enabled.title: Compression Enabled
compression_enabled.description: Enable PostToolUse output compression — debounced token saver, ~7k tokens/session. Default: true.

design_system_enabled.title: Design System Enabled
design_system_enabled.description: Load .sentinel/design-system.md at session start and detect UI drift on edits. Default: true.
